title: Saro´s Easy GM Switch
description: A mod to easily switch game modes – also for other players, e.g., /gm 1 <playername>
body:
![header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Easy_GM_Switch/BH_SEGS_header.webp)
![header2](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Easy_GM_Switch/BH_SEGS_banner.webp)


With **Saros Easy GM Switch**, you can instantly change your game mode—not just for yourself, but for other players as well! Simply append the player's name to the command to switch their game mode.

## Commands

- **`/gamemode 0 [player]`**  
  Switches to **Survival** mode.
- **`/gamemode 1 [player]`**  
  Switches to **Creative** mode.
- **`/gamemode 2 [player]`**  
  Switches to **Adventure** mode.
- **`/gamemode 3 [player]`**  
  Switches to **Spectator** mode.

- **`/gm 0 [player]`**  
  Sets the mode to **Survival**.
- **`/gm 1 [player]`**  
  Sets the mode to **Creative**.
- **`/gm 2 [player]`**  
  Sets the mode to **Adventure**.
- **`/gm 3 [player]`**  
  Sets the mode to **Spectator**.
- **`/gm a [player]`**  
  Sets the mode to **Adventure**.
- **`/gm c [player]`**  
  Sets the mode to **Creative**.
- **`/gm s [player]`**  
  Sets the mode to **Survival**.
- **`/gm sp [player]`**  
  Sets the mode to **Spectator**.

*Note: The optional parameter `[player]` allows you to change the game mode for another player.*


With this mod, you have complete control over the game modes on your server. Whether you need to quickly switch between Survival, Creative, Adventure, or Spectator modes—**Saros Easy GM Switch** makes it effortless!


[![Bisect Hosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Saros_Easy_GM_Switch/BH_SEGS_promo.webp)](https://server.sarocesch.de/refersaro.php)

**Project Support & Usage**

**Hosting:** For the best performance, I recommend using BisectHosting linked in the banner.

**Modpacks:** You are free to include my work in any modpack. Please ensure proper credit is given by providing a link to this project page.
